title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week delivered major enhancements to automation discovery and analysis capabilities. OpsPal now automatically detects your organization's revenue fields and sales processes, providing more accurate RevOps assessments. We also introduced smart automation recommendations based on your existing Salesforce setup, and improved reliability across all platform connections.

entries.headline: Smart automation recommendations learn from your existing setup
details: OpsPal now analyzes your current automations and suggests improvements
Recommendations are tailored to your specific business processes and data structure
System automatically prioritizes suggestions based on potential impact

entries.headline: More reliable Salesforce automation discovery
Better tracking of automation analysis across all platforms
Automation analysis now works across HubSpot and Marketo
details: Same detailed automation insights now available for HubSpot and Marketo
Consistent analysis experience across all your revenue platforms

entries.headline: More comprehensive Salesforce automation discovery
Complete automation inventory now includes all Salesforce components
Safer analysis of production environments
details: Read-only operations are now clearly separated from changes
Better protection against accidental modifications during analysis

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed of new features
details: Release notes are now automatically generated and published
Get notified about new features and improvements as they ship

entries.headline: Better Salesforce permission analysis
Resolved connection issues with complex Salesforce setups
Faster simple data lookups without extra routing
Easier Windows installation with automatic dependency setup
details: Windows users now get automatic installation of required tools
Simplified setup process handles Node.js and other dependencies

entries.headline: Better error detection and reporting during analysis
Improved Windows installation reliability
Read-only analysis now works reliably on production orgs
Assessment results now capture revenue context for better insights
Custom templates and branding persist through updates
details: Your custom templates and brand gallery items are now preserved during platform updates
Customizations are stored safely and automatically restored

entries.headline: Automatic revenue field detection and sales process analysis
details: OpsPal automatically finds your organization's revenue fields and sales stages
Analysis adapts to your specific field names like Annual Contract Value or Net New ARR
More accurate RevOps assessments based on your actual revenue data structure

entries.headline: Better Windows terminal experience with Git Bash
Automatic dependency installation during setup
One-click Windows installation script
Smoother setup experience and better plugin detection
Pre-deployment validation prevents common Salesforce errors
details: Automatically checks picklist and record type configurations before deployment
Validates field history tracking limits to prevent deployment failures
Catches configuration conflicts before they cause problems

entries.headline: Automatic secret scanning protects sensitive data
Enhanced security scanning for all code changes
Removed hardcoded credentials for better security
Simplified installer access
Resolved deployment validation errors in complex Salesforce flows
